## Morning Briefing — June 10, 2026

### Markets

- **Stocks down** — S&P 500 -0.6%, Nasdaq -0.8%, Dow -280pts
- **Why:** US-Iran military escalation (oil spiking), CPI hit 4.2% YoY (highest in a year), tech/semis selling off on AI cost concerns
- **Movers:** Robinhood +8.1%, SMCI -12%, Nvidia & Apple under pressure

### AI Headlines

- **Meta** laying off ~8,000 (10% of workforce) in AI-focused restructuring; 7,000 more reassigned to AI teams
- **Snap** cut ~1,000 jobs — AI now generates 65%+ of Snap's new code
- **Trump EO** asks AI cos to voluntarily share frontier models with feds 30 days pre-release for cybersecurity benchmarking
- **U-Michigan** built an AI that reads brain MRIs in seconds, identifying neurological conditions
- **MIT Media Lab** study: AI weakening human ability to detect fake news (GPS-for-navigation analogy)
- **Agentic AI** trend accelerating — shifting from chat to autonomous task completion across legal, coding, payments, research

### Email & Calendar

Not available — no Gmail or Calendar MCP tools connected. You can add these via MCP server config if you'd like them in future briefings.

- **S&P 500** -1.06% | **Nasdaq** -1.6% | **Dow** -0.95%
- **CPI came in hot**: 4.2% annual rate — highest since Apr 2023
- **U.S.–Iran tensions**: military strikes exchanged after helicopter incident in Strait of Hormuz; oil jumping
- **Tech selling off**: Nvidia, Apple, AMD down; Super Micro -12%

- **Apple announced Gemini-powered Siri** + multi-AI Extensions (Claude now an iPhone option); iOS 27 Beta 1 dropped

- **MIT**: AI shown to weaken fake-news detection skills (GPS-for-navigation analogy)
- **Ferveret** (MIT spinout): dramatically cuts energy/water for AI chip cooling

# Morning Briefing — June 10, 2026

---

## Markets — Red day

| Index | Move |
|-------|------|
| S&P 500 | **-1.06%** (-78 pts) |
| Dow | **-0.95%** (-486 pts) |
| Nasdaq | **-1.6%** (-475 pts) |

**Why it's down:**
- **US-Iran escalation** — new military strikes after a US helicopter was shot down over the Strait of Hormuz. Oil jumping.
- **CPI hot** — May inflation at 4.2% annual rate, highest monthly gain since Apr 2023.
- **Tech selling off** — NVDA, AAPL, AMD all lower on AI cost jitters. SMCI down 12%.

**Green spots:** HOOD +8.1%, KLAC +6.7%, AMAT +5.5%.

---

## AI Headlines

- **Apple WWDC** — Tim Cook's final keynote as CEO. Gemini-powered Siri, new multi-AI Extensions system (Claude now an iPhone option for the first time), iOS 27 Beta 1 dropped.
- **EU AI Act** — 55 days until the bulk enforcement deadline (Aug 2). High-risk AI rules for employment, education, finance, law enforcement go live.
- **UMich brain MRI AI** — new system reads brain MRIs in seconds, identifying neurological conditions at scale.
- **MIT / AI & misinformation** — Media Lab study finds AI tools may weaken our ability to detect fake news (GPS-for-navigation analogy).

---
